title: Aazhi Alai Lyrics Vizhithru
stanzas:
Aazhi alai neerum
thaedaamal thinam thaedum
thaedal karaiyin oaram

oru seiyaaga urumaari
thaaiyaagi enai thaanga
vaan thandha pon dhevathai

en vizhi pona pinnaalum
vazhiyaagi oliyaagi
oli kaattum siru venpirai

unai tholaithaen
naan vaadinen
nee varum paadhai
thaedinen en poo anname

Aazhi alai neerum
thaedaamal thinam thaedum
thaedal karaiyin oaram

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

Who is the singer of the song Aazhi Alai?

The song is sung by the talented Vaikom Vijayalakshmi.

What is the release year of the movie Vizhithru?

The movie was released in the year 2017.

Who composed the music for the song?

The music was composed by Sathyan Mahalingam.

What is the theme of the song?

The song carries a motivational and soothing theme.

Who are the lead actors in the movie Vizhithru?

The movie stars Vidharth and Dhansika in lead roles.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Aazhi Alai from the movie Vizhithru, released in 2017, is a motivational and soothing melody sung by Vaikom Vijayalakshmi. Featuring actors Vidharth and Dhansika, the song's lyrics and composition by Sathyan Mahalingam evoke a sense of hope and perseverance. It beautifully captures the essence of striving for one's goals amidst challenges. The harmonious tune and heartfelt rendition make it a memorable addition to Tamil cinema's musical repertoire.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Aazhi Alai, a captivating melody from the movie Vizhithru, showcases the soulful voice of Vaikom Vijayalakshmi. Composed by Sathyan Mahalingam, this song resonates with motivational and soothing vibes. Dive into this masterpiece to experience a blend of heartfelt lyrics and enchanting music.
stanzaMeanings: The ocean waves endlessly search for the shore without rest.
Time passes as tears flow from the eyes, running and wandering.
A motherly figure, a divine gift from the heavens, supports me.
Even after my vision fades, a small crescent moon lights the path ahead.
I lost you, I withered; I searched for the path you would return on, my dear flower-like bird.
The ocean waves endlessly search for the shore without rest.
Time passes as tears flow from the eyes, running and wandering.
